title: Premium Wild Bird Food – Calci Worms for Garden Birds – High Energy Wild Food, No Mess Bird Feed For All Species (3L Tub, Calci Worms)
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: 🐦 Premium Quality & Nutrition – Protein-rich calci worms, made from dried Black Soldier Fly larvae, give garden birds energy and calcium for strong eggshells, healthy bones, and year-round feeding.
🌿 Freshness-Sealed for Maximum Taste – Each 3L Tub of wild bird seed is air-sealed to preserve freshness, flavor, and nutrients, ensuring your birds get the best with every peck.

🛡 Safe & Healthy Choice – These natural dried calci worms are rich in calcium and protein, offering pure nutrition for wild birds. Premium insect bird food to support bone health, egg production, and keep garden visitors active year-round.
📦 Generous 3L Size for Less Hassle – A bulk bird seed Tub means fewer refills and more time enjoying nature. Ideal for use in bird feeders, bird tables, and ground-feeding stations.

🌎 A Variety of Blends for Every Bird Species – Whether your feathered visitors prefer sunflower hearts, peanuts, dried mealworms, or a no-mess seed mix, we have the perfect wild bird food selection to attract a diverse range of birds.
